title: Sentinel APEX Intelligence Report: Microsoft Patch Tuesday, March 2026 Edition

sections.executive_summary: This report covers Microsoft Patch Tuesday, March 2026 Edition — a threat with risk score 10.0/10. Priority: P2_HIGH. Affected sectors: Microsoft.
sections.technical_analysis:
Threat: Microsoft Patch Tuesday, March 2026 Edition
Risk Score: 10.0/10 | Exploitability: 5.0/10
Attack Vectors: Client — Exploitation for Client Execution; Technique T1542; Local — Exploitation for Privilege Escalation
Impact: CATASTROPHIC — Complete system compromise likely
Attack Chain: Execution (T1203) → Privilege Escalation (T1068)
ASSESSMENT: CRITICAL — Immediate defensive action required. Activate IR procedures.
